summary: backup-my-data exfiltrates host and filesystem data to attacker-controlled endpoint
details: collect.js in this package collects host identity (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) and filesystem contents (fs reads gated by fs.existsSync checks), spawns child processes, and POSTs the gathered data over HTTP to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination is a third-party, non-publisher domain unrelated to any documented backup functionality, and the code combines child_process, http/https, os, and fs modules in a single exfiltration script. Installing or loading this package leaks host identifiers and filesystem data to that endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
